final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 小红书-style cover image (vertical, 9-grid format) for a 素人 creator post featuring the 大疆 Pocket 4.

Style/medium: needs a "素人风格" 小红书 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 9-grid (九宫格) vertical cover layout with the product as a featured visual element
Subject: must include the 大疆 Pocket 4 as the hero product, presented in a casual, everyday 素人 creator context
Scene/backdrop: needs a lifestyle / everyday backdrop fitting 素人 小红书 content — exact scene is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, approachable, natural-light atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a fresh, youthful direction fitting 小红书 素人 aesthetics — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "大疆Pocket4初体验" (large, centered, primary title) — font must feel cute (可爱) and visually differentiated (差异化)
Constraints: must be vertical portrait format; 9-grid cover composition must be clearly structured; title text must be prominently centered
Avoid: overly polished commercial advertising look; avoid studio-style product photography feel
